about_intro: Welcome to the TanStack demo application. This section showcases various features and integrations built with modern web technologies.
about_router: TanStack Router for powerful routing and navigation
about_query: TanStack Query for server state management
about_form: TanStack Form for flexible form handling
about_clerk: Clerk for authentication and user management
about_convex: Convex for backend database and real-time features
about_ai: AI integrations for chat, image generation, and more
about_explore_desc: Navigate through the different demo sections using the menu to see these technologies in action. Each demo is designed to showcase specific capabilities and best practices.
about_note: Note: This demo section will be removed in future versions of the application.
